query: US spot Bitcoin ETF net flows late June 2026 and early July 2026, weekly trend from Farside Investors and SoSoValue. Are net outflows continuing into the week of June 29-July 3 2026? What is the Bitcoin price trend in late June 2026?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the key takeaway:

**Did net outflows continue into the week of June 29–July 3, 2026?** Yes, but the streak broke mid-week. The week netted **~-$527M in outflows** — the **8th consecutive negative week**, the longest streak on record. Three days of heavy outflows (Jun 29 -$231M, Jun 30 -$222.6M, Jul 1 -$296M) were partially offset by a **+$223.5M reversal on July 2** (largest single-day inflow in ~2 months, led by Fidelity FBTC and ARK ARKB), triggered by a weak June jobs report easing Fed rate-hike fears. This snapped a 10-day, $2.7B outflow streak. Flows turned clearly positive the following week (+$265M on July 6).

**Bitcoin price trend in late June 2026:** Sharply down, then a rebound. BTC fell from ~$66,289 (Jun 15) to a local low of **$58,559 on June 30** (~12% drawdown, coinciding with peak ETF outflows), then bounced ~9% into early July (~$64K by Jul 6, ~$63.2K on Jul 8). BTC remains ~50% below its 52-week high and only ~9% above its 52-week low — a broadly corrective regime.

Data cross-validated across Farside Investors (via KuCoin/TechTimes), bitbo.io/SoSoValue-style trackers, walletpilot, and Yahoo Finance price data.
